author: chetachiezikeuzor
description: Tuck a menu inside your status bar and show helpful information for your chosen file.

manifest.author: Chetachi
manifest.description: Get Info is a plugin that tucks a menu inside your status bar and shows helpful information for your chosen file 📄.
manifest.name: Get Info
